intro: Here are your DIY instructions for the Dark Forest Illuminating Paper Lantern builder kit:
steps: Lay out the parts provided: Paper panels, Wooden panels, glue stick, light string, rope, and tassel.
Connect the edges that interlink for the wooden panels.
Glue edges and let glue rest and dry faster by reducing glue amount and residue.
Insert and attach next wooden panel and repeat process of gluing.
Attach base panel with glue to the created triangle.
Glue paper panels on Ethereum Lantern.
Insert light string and attach to top.
Attach tassel to bottom of structure.
Tie rope together on top for hanging lantern.
outro: The DIY lantern kit was designed for you to be able to travel with and build on your own in the comfort of your home. You are free to use tape or any other method to strengthen the structure and apply the paper panels. Remember to spark the change you want. Be positive-sum.
